faq.question: Are stablecoin yields safe?
faq.answer: Stablecoin yields carry smart contract risk, platform risk, and depeg risk. Higher yields generally mean higher risk. Established platforms like Aave and Compound are considered safer but offer lower yields (3-8% APY).

howWeCalculate.intro: This stablecoin yield calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
steps: Enter your specific values into the calculator fields above
Our algorithm applies the relevant formulas using your inputs
Results are calculated instantly in your browser — nothing is sent to a server
Review the detailed breakdown to understand how each factor affects your result
